title: Manage the Database Users for Your Cluster

sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To create a database user, you must have
[Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) or [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to
the project.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
You created a database user when you created your first cluster.

To manage the database users on your cluster, see
Configure Database Users.

To learn more about the security features available, see
[Configure Security Features for Clusters](setup-cluster-security).

sections.heading: Next steps
sections.body:
Now that you have a database user for your cluster, proceed to
Manage the IP Access List.
